use std::collections::HashMap;
use std::borrow::Cow;

#[derive(Hash, Eq, PartialEq, Clone)]
struct CacheKey {
    tenant_id: u64,
    user_id: u64,
}

struct Cache {
    store: HashMap<CacheKey, Vec<u8>>,
}

impl Cache {
    fn get(&self, key: &CacheKey) -> Option<&Vec<u8>> {
        self.store.get(key)
    }

    fn insert(&mut self, key: CacheKey, value: Vec<u8>) {
        self.store.insert(key, value);
    }
}

fn lookup_user(cache: &Cache, tenant_id: u64, user_id: u64) -> Option<Vec<u8>> {
    // GOOD: structured key avoids String allocation
    let key = CacheKey { tenant_id, user_id };
    cache.get(&key).cloned()
}
